summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sai Enterprises hardware shop website. All backend APIs (7/7) and frontend functionality working perfectly. Contact form integration with MongoDB successful. All requested features verified including 8 services, 6 reviews, clickable phone numbers, WhatsApp button, and smooth navigation.
passed_tests: Contact form submission with valid data (201 Created)
Form validation - missing required fields returns 422
GET single inquiry by ID (200 OK)
Frontend page loading and header display
8 services displayed correctly in services section
6 reviews displayed correctly in reviews section
Phone numbers clickable with tel: links (2 numbers)
Contact form frontend submission and clearing

success_percentage.integration: 100% (form submission, data storage, API calls working)
